description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by bold orange highlights along the stock, barrel, and receiver. The weapon has a double-barrel configuration, with both barrels aligned horizontally and reinforced by geometric, ribbed elements near the muzzle. The stock is solid and angular, providing a stable shoulder rest, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver, with a visible trigger guard. A compact sighting device is mounted on top, suggesting enhanced aiming capability. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, angular double-barrel shotgun with black and orange accents, featuring a solid stock and a mounted sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels and the angular, reinforced muzzle with orange highlights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, the mounted sight, and the solid, angular stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's geometric design and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grip, trigger guard, and additional orange detailing along the body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with ribbed reinforcement near the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a squared profile and no visible finger grooves
